---
title: "Spaceship Titanic EDA"
author: "Hazem Masarani & Lam"
date: "2026-03-22"
output: html_document
---

# Load packages
```{r}

if (!requireNamespace("tidyverse")) install.packages('tidyverse')
if (!requireNamespace("caret")) install.packages('caret')
if (!requireNamespace("leaps")) install.packages('leaps')
if (!requireNamespace("bestglm")) install.packages('bestglm')
if (!requireNamespace("MASS")) install.packages('MASS')
if (!requireNamespace("ggplot2")) install.packages('ggplot2')
if (!requireNamespace("gridExtra")) install.packages('gridExtra')
if (!requireNamespace("dplyr"))install.packages("dplyr")
if (!requireNamespace("rpart"))install.packages("rpart")
if (!requireNamespace("reshape2"))install.packages("reshape2")

library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
library(tidyverse)
library(caret)
library(leaps)
library(bestglm)
library(MASS)
library(dplyr)
library(rpart)
library(reshape2)
```

# load files
```{r}
data <- read_csv("../data/preprocessed_data.csv")
test <- read_csv("../data/preprocessed_test.csv")
head(data)
head(test)
```

# Select only important columns
```{r}
selected_columns <- c("CryoSleep", "Age", "VIP", "RoomService", "FoodCourt", "ShoppingMall", "Spa", "VRDeck", "total_spending", "Cabin_num", "Side", "Number", "GroupNumberCount", "FamilyMembersCount", "FamilyMembersCabinCount", "NameFlag", "CabinMidFlag", "HomePlanetEarth", "HomePlanetEuropa", "HomePlanetMars", "Destination55 Cancri e", "DestinationPSO J318.5-22", "DestinationTRAPPIST-1e", "Group1", "Group2", "Group3", "Group4", "Group5", "Group6", "Group7", "DeckA", "DeckB", "DeckC", "DeckD", "DeckE", "DeckF", "DeckG", "DeckG_midCabin", "DeckE_midCabin", "DeckF_midCabin", "CryoSleep_spending_conflict", "Transported")

# data <- data[, selected_columns]
```

# Print corolation heatmap of all numeric features
```{r}
numeric_data <- data[, sapply(data, is.numeric)]

cor_matrix <- cor(numeric_data, use = "complete.obs")

cor_melted <- melt(cor_matrix)

ggplot(cor_melted, aes(x = Var1, y = Var2, fill = value)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(value, 2)), size = 2) +  # show numbers
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", midpoint = 0) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
  ) +
  labs(fill = "Correlation", title = "Correlation Heatmap")
```


# Cabin Number Analysis
```{r}
colnames(data)
```
```{r}
# Group and reshape (like groupby + unstack)

# Create count table
transported_counts <- table(data$Deck, data$Transported)

# Convert to data frame (optional, for plotting)
transported_df <- as.data.frame.matrix(transported_counts)

print(transported_df)

# Bar plot (base R, side-by-side)

barplot(
  t(transported_counts), 
  beside = TRUE,
  col = c("red", "green"),
  legend.text = c("Not Transported", "Transported"),
  args.legend = list(title = "Transported"),
  main = "Transported vs Not Transported Passengers per Deck",
  xlab = "Deck",
  ylab = "Number of Passengers"
)
```


# Number of Passenger per Deck:
```{r}
# Count number of passengers per deck
passengers_per_deck <- table(data$Deck)
passengers_per_deck

# Bar plot
barplot(
  passengers_per_deck,
  col = "orange",
  main = "Number of Passengers per Deck",
  xlab = "Deck",
  ylab = "Number of Passengers"
)
```

```{r}
cryosleep_transport_rate <- data %>%
  filter(!is.na(Transported)) %>%             # drop missing Transported
  group_by(CryoSleep, Deck) %>%
  summarise(Transported = mean(Transported), .groups = "drop")  # mean transport rate
cryosleep_transport_rate
ggplot(cryosleep_transport_rate, aes(x = Deck, y = Transported, fill = as.factor(CryoSleep))) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "Transport Rate by Deck and CryoSleep",
    y = "Proportion Transported",
    fill = "CryoSleep"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

# Age Analysis
```{r}
head(data, n=100)

ggplot(data, aes(x = Deck, y = Age)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue") +
  labs(title = "Age Distribution by Deck",
       x = "Deck",
       y = "Age") +
  theme_minimal()

numeric_data <- data[sapply(data, is.numeric)]
cor_matrix <- cor(numeric_data, use = "complete.obs")
cor_matrix["Age", ]

ggplot(data, aes(x = factor(CryoSleep), y = Age)) +
  geom_boxplot()

ggplot(data, aes(x = factor(VIP), y = Age)) +
  geom_boxplot()
```


# Show all final columns
```{r}

```
